reason: Successfully navigated to the SuperAgent application, opened the specified agent, sent a math question message, and received the correct response.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the agents list with "QA-20260630-020122-1nl6" visible in the sidebar with "idle" status
Find and click "QA-20260630-020122-1nl6" agent in sidebar — Agent page opened successfully, displaying the agent landing page with message composer
Verify agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status confirmed as "idle" (visible at top right of agent page)
Send message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed into input field and sent successfully via send button, navigating to session chat view
Wait up to 3 minutes for response — Response received immediately (completed in 1 second)

Verify response mentions "4" and take screenshot — Agent responded with "4", confirming correct math calculation. Screenshot captured showing the conversation with user message on the right ("Hello! What is 2+2?") and agent response in the center ("4")
